## Resource

- Name:
- URL:
- Suggested file or category:
- License or access type:
- Suggested tags, if any:
- Are you affiliated with this resource? Yes / No

## Why It Belongs Here

Briefly explain how this resource helps Operations Research students, researchers, instructors, practitioners, or developers.

## Checklist

- [ ] The link is official or stable.
- [ ] The resource is relevant to Operations Research, optimization, simulation, analytics, or decision science.
- [ ] The resource is maintained, widely used, or historically important.
- [ ] The resource is not a duplicate.
- [ ] The resource is not a pirated or unauthorized copy.
- [ ] The suggested description is concise and non-promotional.
- [ ] Any commercial, proprietary, or access-limited status is clear.
